data.body:
[Daily Free Recruitment x10 Event]

Starting today, use one Recruitment x10 per day for free! (Free 20 Recruit chances available on 2/13(Mon))
You can use a total of a 100 Free Recruitments during this Event!

🗓️Period: 2/5 (Sun) 2:00 AM - 2/14 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)![1SuAGNzRwcTp1fM9Y6OsyxiTZ7HQVjcN.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/1SuAGNzRwcTp1fM9Y6OsyxiTZ7HQVjcN.jpg)
